descriptionShort: Red Deer Rustlers drop games to Richmond Sockeyes in Centennial Cup semifinal series but show improvement.
descriptionLong: Red Deer Rustlers lost the first two games of their Western Canada Centennial Cup semifinal series to Richmond Sockeyes, including an 11-4 defeat and a 6-4 loss, but demonstrated they can compete against the mobile Sockeyes. Despite trailing 4-2 after two periods in game two, the Rustlers showed marked improvement from the previous night's embarrassing performance.

attribution.headline: Rustlers Take Confidence from Sockeyes Series
